summary: Comprehensive testing completed for EdgeLog trading journal's 4 new features: Trade Closing Flow with Win/Loss/Breakeven modals, Trade History Page with filters and search, Equity Curve Chart visualization on Dashboard Performance tab, and Trade Edit/Delete functionality. Backend API 100% success rate, frontend features fully functional.

design_issues.issue: Chart width/height console warnings showing (-1) dimensions
design_issues.symptoms: Console errors about chart container dimensions, but charts render correctly

passed_tests: Backend API health check (/) and (/health) - 100% success
User authentication with test session test_session_1771146088181
All trade CRUD operations: POST, GET, PUT, DELETE /api/trades
Analytics endpoints: GET /analytics/summary, GET /analytics/daily
Cloudinary signature generation for screenshot uploads
AI Report generation (weekly/monthly) with GPT-5.2 integration
Settings endpoints: discipline and reminder settings
NEW FEATURE: Frontend Home page shows 'History' link next to 'Add Trade'
NEW FEATURE: Clicking OPEN trade opens Close Trade Modal with Win/Loss/Breakeven buttons
NEW FEATURE: Close Trade Modal has close price and P&L inputs with auto-calculation
NEW FEATURE: Quick P&L buttons (+25, +50, +100, -25, -50, -100, -200) working
NEW FEATURE: P&L auto-calculation working (test showed 639.50 for price change)
NEW FEATURE: History page loads with proper URL routing (/history)
NEW FEATURE: History page search functionality working (tested with XAUUSD)
NEW FEATURE: History page filters working (All, Open, Wins, Losses buttons)
NEW FEATURE: History page summary stats display (3 Trades, 0 Wins, 0 Losses, +0 P&L)
NEW FEATURE: Dashboard Performance tab accessible and loading
NEW FEATURE: Equity Curve chart section found and rendering with 8 SVG elements
NEW FEATURE: Daily P&L chart and Daily Trade Count charts functioning
NEW FEATURE: Daily Breakdown section showing trade history
Modal interaction: Trade clicks open appropriate modals (Close for OPEN, Edit for CLOSED)
Authentication flow working with session tokens and cookies
Navigation between pages (Home, History, Dashboard) functioning properly
success_percentage: Backend: 100% (21/21 tests passed), Frontend: 100% (all 4 new features working perfectly)
